name: Double Fudge Saucepan Brownies
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Package Hershey's semi-sweet choc chips divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch square baking pan.
3. In a medium saucepan over low heat, cook sugar, butter, and water, stirring constantly until the mixture comes to a boil.
4. Remove from heat; immediately add one cup of chocolate chips, stirring until melted.
5. Stir in eggs and vanilla until blended.
6. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt; stir into the chocolate mixture.
7. Stir in the remaining one cup of chips and nuts if desired.
8. Pour into the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until brownies begin to pull away from the sides of the pan.
10. Cool completely.
11. Cut into bars (about 18 brownies).
